free_text: Differential cross sections at low energies for
A cryogenic windowless gas target was chosen to avoid
energy-loss uncertainty in entrance and exit foils. A
temperature of the target chamber (10.5 K for
deuterium and 11.2 K for tritium gas) just above the
freezing point of the target gas gives the maximum
target density compatible with an appropriate energy
loss in the target. The resulting gas density is low,
